title: Good Luck Prism Multicolor Banner (3.6 Meters) 1 Piece - Decorative Party Banner for Festivities and Celebrations
features: GOOD LUCK PRISM BANNER: Add a touch of luck and festivities to your celebration with our unique good luck prism multicolor banner, designed to brighten up any party and bring a smile to your guests' faces.

MULTICOLOR DESIGN: This eye-catching banner features a stunning multicolor prism pattern, perfect for capturing attention and creating a fun, lively atmosphere at any event – from birthdays to graduations, and everything in between.

IMPRESSIVE SIZE: Measuring 3.6 meters in length, our decorative party banner is large enough to make a statement at any event, big or small; it's sure to become a conversation piece among your guests.

ONE PIECE CONVENIENCE: Each package comes with 1 ready-to-hang good luck prism multicolor banner, saving you time and effort in preparation for your special day. Simply unravel, hang, and let the festivities begin.

IDEAL FOR VARIOUS CELEBRATIONS: Our versatile decorative party banner is perfect for both indoor and outdoor festivities, including birthdays, anniversaries, baby showers, graduation parties, and more.
description: Product Description Wish your loved ones all the best luck on their journey with our Prismatic Foil "Good Luck!" Banner. 1 Banner - 12 ft. This prismatic foil banner features a multicolor "Good Luck!" headline with rainbow and cloud prints. An awesome addition to your party; hang from walls, tables, windows, or other surfaces to create a warm and lovely party atmosphere. Made of durable material that is easy to assemble and hang up. This banner can be reused and easily stored to use in the future. Box Contains 1 x Banner
